title: EPI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Graduate Apprentice Posts
description: The Engineering Projects India (EPI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Graduate Apprentice Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the EPI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, a...
